items.name: 大衡城址
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 宮城県黒川郡大衡村大衡字塩浪4-1他

en.description_en: A historic site (shiseki) among the monuments category. It is village-designated by Ohira Village, designated on 2003-12-01. It is located at Shionami 4-1 and elsewhere, Ohira, Ohira Village, Kurokawa District, Miyagi Prefecture.

items.name: 大瓜神楽
items.location: 宮城県黒川郡大衡村大瓜
items.description: 所有者等: 大瓜神楽保存会

en.description_en: A folk cultural property (performing art). It is village-designated by Ohira Village, designated on 2003-12-01. It is located at Ouri, Ohira Village, Kurokawa District, Miyagi Prefecture.

items.name: 須岐神社
items.location: 宮城県黒川郡大衡村駒場字下宮前2
items.description: 所有者等: 宗教法人須岐神社

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property (building). It is village-designated by Ohira Village, designated on 1997-04-28. It is located at Shimomiyamae 2, Komaba, Ohira Village, Kurokawa District, Miyagi Prefecture.
